div.style: font-family: 'Noto Sans Ethiopic', 'Times New Roman', serif; font-size: 12px; padding: 0 30px;

t.t-value: o.location_dest_id.warehouse_id.storeman_id if o.location_dest_id and o.location_dest_id.warehouse_id else False

div.div: የእህሉ/የእቃው ገቢ የሆነበት ምክንያት/ Reason/Justification / Purpose

ያዘጋጀው ስም እና ፊርማ/
Prepared By:
የክምችት ክፍል ሐላፊ ስም እና ፊርማ:

t.t-value: o.location_id.warehouse_id.storeman_id if o.location_id and o.location_id.warehouse_id else False

div.h3: ለደንበኛ ማስረከቢያ ሰነድ/ Customer Delivery Note

div.span:
Invoice / የተመረትበት ሰነድ
Doc Ref No:

div.div:
ያዘጋጀው ስም እና ፊርማ/
Prepared By:

የሃላፊ ስም እና ፊርማ/
Approved By:
የመጋዘን ክፍል ሃላፊ ስም እና ፊርማ:
Copy Distribution: Original-Driver 1st Copy Store Keeper 2nd Copy-Pad

t.t-value: min_rows - row_count if row_count < min_rows else 0
o.location_id.warehouse_id.storeman_id if o.location_id and o.location_id.warehouse_id else False

div.div: Copy Distribution: Original-Guards Manager | 1st Copy Store Keeper | 2nd Copy Warehouse | 3rd Copy-Pad
